title: TOON Test Fixture
description: Schema for language-agnostic TOON test fixtures

version.description: Baseline TOON spec version for this file. Per-test `minSpecVersion` overrides this for individual tests that exercise newer behavior. Fixtures remain valid for all later versions.

category.description: Test category: encode (JSON → TOON) or decode (TOON → JSON)

description.description: Brief description of what this fixture file tests

name.description: Descriptive test name explaining what is being validated

input.description: Input value - JSON value for encode tests, TOON string for decode tests

expected.description: Expected output - TOON string for encode tests, JSON value for decode tests

shouldError.description: If true, this test expects an error to be thrown

indent.description: Number of spaces per indentation level

keyFolding.description: Key folding mode for encoders: 'off' (default) or 'safe' (encode only)

flattenDepth.description: Maximum depth to fold key chains when keyFolding is 'safe'. Values less than 2 have no practical folding effect (encode only)

expandPaths.description: Path expansion mode for decoders: 'off' (default) or 'safe' (decode only)

note.description: Optional note explaining special cases or edge case behavior

minSpecVersion.description: Minimum specification version required for this test
